subcodes.title: Kitab al-Vahid 03 (Tablet to the thid Letter of the Living)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Whom all that are in the heavens and on earth do glorify. There is none other God but He, the Mighty, the Incomparable. He it is in Whose Hand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله المعتمد العلی. الحمد لله الذی تسبح له من فی السموات و الأرض ﻻ اله الا هو العزیز المنیع هو الذی بیده
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and wrath of God
